# Security

If you discover a security vulnerability in Skaffu, please report it responsibly.

## How to report

- **Email:** [hello@skaffu.com](mailto:hello@skaffu.com)
- **GitHub:** [Private security advisory](https://github.com/arpi09/grocery-manager/security/advisories/new) on this repository (preferred for detailed reports)

Please do **not** disclose the issue publicly (issues, social media, etc.) before we have had time to investigate and respond.

## What to include

- Description of the vulnerability and potential impact
- Steps to reproduce
- Affected routes, versions, or environments if known

We aim to acknowledge reports within a few business days.
